expectations.text: The review identifies that the catch block sends no HTTP response to the client
expectations.evidence: Lines 11-19: 'catch block logs the error but never calls res.json(...) or res.status(...).send(...). Express does not send any automatic response in this case'

expectations.text: The review explains the consequence (client request hangs or times out)
expectations.evidence: Lines 21-22: 'The client's HTTP connection hangs open until it times out... requests that appear to "freeze" for 30–60 seconds'

expectations.text: The review suggests adding a res.status(500) error response in the catch block
expectations.evidence: Lines 24-28: code example showing res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: 'Payment processing failed' })

claims.claim: The review additionally caught: PCI-DSS-sensitive error logging, req.body null guard, and implicit 200 status, plus provided a full corrected route
claims.evidence: Issues 3-5 on lines 61-108 and corrected route on lines 112-149
